steps.title: Decode the function parameters
steps.content:
The function $P(t) = 24.8(1.036)^t$ has:
  • Input $t$ = years after 1984
  • Output $P(t)$ = population in millions

steps.title: Interpret the value $P(8) = 32.91$
steps.content:
The statement $P(8) \approx 32.91$ means that when $t = 8$, the population is 32.91 million.

Since $t = 8$ corresponds to 8 years after 1984, we conclude: 8 years after 1984, the predicted population is approximately 32.91 million. That matches choice C — C is correct.
